title: Yorn Skot

'''Yorn Skot''' was a gas giant in the [[Yorn Skot system/Legends|Yorn Skot system]] near [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]]. It was a natural source of non-spinsealed [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas. 

==History==
===Galactic Republic===
The planet was owned and governed by [[Clode Rhoden]], who grew wealthy from the [[Yorn Skot mining station]]. His lack of ecological concern made him a target for assassination by the [[Green Forge]] eco-terrorists.

In [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] went on a mission to save the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'' from sinking into the gas giant. They discovered that Rhoden was trying to kill his wife by sending her in an escape pod into the Station and destroying it, then collecting insurance money by blaming the destruction on Green Forge.

[[File:Yorn_Skot_floating_platform.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[High Orbit Precision Entry Squad|H.O.P.E. Squad]] approaches a repulsor platform on Yorn Skot.]]

At the end of the affair, after multiple betrayals by many parties involved, the station was saved, although Rhoden lost it to [[Saul Moegantz]]. [[Pressure pirates]] stole the ''Express'' and died aboard it when it exploded due to a bomb meant to kill Rhoden.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Treetower]] was sent to the planet to disrupt goods smuggling being carried out by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. When the mission went awry, he was rescued by [[High Orbit Precision Entry Squad]], although only the squad leader survived the extraction. The goods were actually [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] slaves being shipped to work in droid factories.

===Galactic Empire===
Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Imperial Admiral [[Coy]]'s ''[[Mathayus]]'' intercepted a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] distress signal coming from near Yorn Skot. The ''Mathayus'' went to investigate. [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Atali]] and a number of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] boarded the ship the ''Mathayus'' intercepted there—but it was a actually a trap laid by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]], a decoy filled with explosives which blew up and damaged the hangar bay of the ''Mathayus'', killing Atali and his men. The whole trap had been meant to kill [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was aboard the ''Mathayus'', but Vader managed to escape harm.

==Inhabitants==
Settlement of the planet was led by Clode Rhoden, and consisted of a diverse range of species. The mining station's population numbered into the thousands. Rhoden employed members of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] and [[Human/Legends|Human]] species, while his luxury cruise liner the Aurorient Express attracted a variety of species, from [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], [[Gran/Legends|Gran]], and [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], to [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] and [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]].
